display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
ShenSuspicion过高
缺出生证明或旧照片

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
EvidenceScore较高
ShenSuspicion不高
阻止复仇

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
只公开当前命案
旧案证据不足

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p: 放任复仇

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
激怒陆景川
RevengeTimer过高

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
无废窑暗道图
RevengeTimer过高

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
EvidenceScore高
FatherClue高
VillageSilence低
ShenSuspicion低
RevengeTimer未满

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p: 误判沈月娥埋雷

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p: 破解孩子线

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p: 父亲线完整

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p: 身份+动机完整

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p: 避免困死废窑

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
林知夏抵达青瓷庄
外来编剧进入暴雨封村

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
第一章：抵达青瓷庄
确认封闭环境，接触六名主要人物

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
追问陆怀民旧事
FatherClue+1
VillageSilence+1

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
顺从官方村史
OutsiderTrust+1
SelfDoubt+1

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
相信陆景川带路
LuTrust+1

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
反问陆景川为何愿意说
LuTrust-1
EvidenceScore+1

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
第二章：账房尸体
周启明死亡，釉料粉末指向沈月娥

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
认定沈月娥懂釉料
ShenSuspicion+2
LuTrust+1

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
怀疑现场被布置
EvidenceScore+1
SelfDoubt-1

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
追查周启明旧账
EvidenceScore+2

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
质问陆景川为何懂粉末
LuTrust-1
EvidenceScore+1

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
第三章：尸检报告
陈伯远线索证明旧案死因有问题

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
公开播放林父录音
EvidenceScore+1
VillageSilence+2

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
保留录音用于对证
FatherClue+2
EvidenceScore+1

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
追问陈伯远谁让他签字
VillageSilence+1
EvidenceScore+1

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
让陆景川听录音
LuTrust-1
RevengeTimer+1

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
第四章：祠堂遗言
破解“不是她，是孩子”

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
接受孩子是目击者解释
LuTrust+1
SelfDoubt+1

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
追问沈月娥孩子是谁
ShenSuspicion-1
FatherClue+1

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
注意陆怀民看向旧照片
EvidenceScore+1

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
调查族谱被刮名
EvidenceScore+1
VillageSilence变化

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
第五章：废窑暗格
取舍旧案核心证物

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
让陆景川带路
LuTrust+1
RevengeTimer+1

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
让沈月娥同行
ShenSuspicion-1
EvidenceScore+1

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
独自进入废窑
SelfDoubt+1
EvidenceScore可能+2

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
取出生证明+举报信
EvidenceScore+2

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
取出生证明+林父缺页
FatherClue+2
EvidenceScore+1

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
取举报信+林父缺页
FatherClue+1
EvidenceScore+1

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
取废窑暗道图
RevengeTimer-1
降低D风险

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
第六章：最后对质
三层判断：凶手、旧案、公开方式

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
指认沈月娥
ShenSuspicion判定

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
指认陆景川
EvidenceScore判定

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
指认村庄集体沉默
VillageSilence判定

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
只公开当前命案
EvidenceScore不足时转C

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
公开完整旧案并阻止复仇
RevengeTimer-1

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
理解陆景川但阻止复仇
FatherClue判定
RevengeTimer-1

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
放任复仇
RevengeTimer+2

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
羞辱陆景川
RevengeTimer+1
SelfDoubt+1

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
A 真相公开
旧案重查，沈月娥洗清

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
B 替罪羊
沈月娥被误认凶手

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
C 复仇继续
知道可疑但证据不足

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
D 困死废窑
推理失败且无暗道图

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
E 隐藏结局：窑火未熄，证词重燃
证据、父亲线和村庄证词同时成立
